# Aichat

Tenant-scoped AI chat entry map for web chat, Telegram ingress, shared conversation links, and quote-wizard flows.

## Verified paths

### Routes

- [Modules/Aichat/Routes/web.php](../../Modules/Aichat/Routes/web.php) — admin chat routes under `/aichat/chat/*`, Telegram webhook ingress under `/aichat/telegram/webhook/{webhookKey}`, and signed shared conversations under `/aichat/chat/shared/{conversation}`
- [Modules/Aichat/Routes/api.php](../../Modules/Aichat/Routes/api.php) — auth API placeholder route for `/aichat`
